query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `notification_preferences` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `userId` varchar(64), `enabledStages` json NOT NULL, `notifyOwner` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, `notifyInApp` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `notification_preferences_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`));
